position.notAvailable: This position is no longer available.

fields.invalidStyle: Field style must be either "short" or "paragraph"!

position.ageGateEnabled: Age verification is now **enabled** for this position.
position.ageGateDisabled: Age verification is now **disabled** for this position.

workflow.noNotes: No internal notes on this application.

workflow.disabled: Application workflow states have been **disabled**. Custom statuses are preserved for re-enabling.

workflow.cannotRemoveRequired: Cannot remove required status: **{0}**. The `submitted`, `approved`, and `denied` statuses are required.

workflow.invalidStatusId: Status ID must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (max 20 characters).
workflow.checkNoApplication: You don't have any open applications in this server.
